title: Student starts an exam after granting permissions
description: A student can start an exam from the dashboard, grant camera and screen-share access, and enter the live exam interface.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the live exam interface is displayed
Verify the webcam proctoring view is displayed

title: Student signs in and reaches the student dashboard
description: This verifies that a student can log in through the shared form and land on the student dashboard with their exam list visible.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Student logs in and reaches the exam dashboard
description: A student can sign in from the login form and land on the student dashboard with the available exam list visible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the student dashboard is displayed
Verify the available exam list is displayed

title: Administrator signs in and reaches the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an administrator can log in through the shared form and land on the admin dashboard with summary information visible.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for an administrator account
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Student answers questions and submits the exam
description: A student can select answers in the live exam interface and submit the completed exam successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the exam submission confirmation is visible
Verify the exam session is completed

title: Student submits a completed exam
description: This verifies that a student can finish answering an exam and submit it from the live exam interface, resulting in a completion confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Verify an exam submission confirmation is visible
Verify the exam is no longer in the active live exam state

title: Administrator logs in and reaches the admin dashboard
description: An administrator can sign in from the login form and land on the admin dashboard with exam summary statistics visible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify exam summary statistics are displayed

title: Student starts an exam from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a student can begin an exam session from the dashboard and reach the live exam interface.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Verify the live exam interface is displayed

title: Student sees available exams after signing in
description: This verifies that a signed-in student can review the exam list on the dashboard and the available exams are visible.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account

title: Student sees the exam question controls during a live exam
description: This verifies that the live exam interface provides the controls needed to move through questions and manage review status.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Verify question navigation controls are displayed
Verify review marking controls are displayed

title: Student moves between questions and keeps answers selected
description: A student can navigate to the next and previous questions while their selected answers remain visible for each question.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the previously selected answer remains visible
Verify question navigation controls are available

title: Student uses the question grid to jump to a question
description: A student can open the question grid and jump directly to another question during the exam.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the selected question is displayed
Verify the question grid can be reopened

title: Administrator reviews exam summary statistics
description: This verifies that an administrator can access the dashboard and review the available exam summary statistics.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for an administrator account
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify exam summary statistics are displayed

title: Student uses the question grid to jump between questions
description: This verifies that a student can open the question grid and jump directly to another question in the exam.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Jump to a different question from the grid
Verify the selected question is displayed
Verify the question grid remains available

title: Student answers and changes responses while moving through the exam
description: This verifies that a student can answer questions, navigate between them, and keep selected answers when returning to earlier questions.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Verify the previously selected answer is still shown
Verify the current question is displayed

title: Student marks questions for review and sees them in the review set
description: This verifies that a student can mark questions for review during the exam and later identify those marked questions before submission.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Mark the current question for review
Verify the current question is shown as marked for review

title: Student marks a question for review before submitting
description: A student can mark a question for review and later see that marked question reflected in the exam flow before submission.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Mark the current question for review
Verify the marked question is indicated in the question grid
Verify the review status remains visible on the question

title: Student is blocked from starting an exam after denying proctoring permissions
description: This verifies that the exam start flow handles denied camera or screen-sharing access by preventing the live exam from beginning and showing a blocked-state message.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Verify a blocked proctoring state is visible
Verify the live exam interface is not displayed

title: Student is blocked when camera or screen-share access is denied
description: If a student denies required proctoring permissions, the exam does not enter the live session and a blocked proctoring state is shown.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the exam does not start
Verify a blocked proctoring state is displayed

title: Student sees an error when submitting without answering required questions
description: This verifies that the exam interface prevents submission when required questions are unanswered and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Submit the exam without answering all required questions
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the exam remains open for completion

title: Student cannot move before the first question or past the last question
description: This verifies that the exam navigation controls prevent boundary navigation beyond the first and last questions and show the expected disabled or error state.

steps.description: Fill in email and password for a student account
Try to move to the previous question from the first question
Try to move to the next question from the last question
Verify the current question remains visible
